_comment: TEMPLATE — NOT loadable. `template: true` makes validateReframeFaceDetectorManifest reject this manifest so the ORT face-detector path stays disabled and Smart Reframe falls back to saliency (or to the existing MediaPipe BlazeFace path, if the user loads that). To enable the ORT face detector: (1) pick a face-detection ONNX with a verified permissive licence, (2) host the bytes on an allowlisted host (same-origin `/_model/{hf,gh,gcs}/…` proxy or a Cloudflare R2 bucket), (3) remove `template`, (4) fill `model.url`/`model.sizeBytes`/`model.checksum` (sha256), (5) update `io` and `decode` to match the exported graph's signature. See README.md and docs/ML-RUNTIME.md.
